notes: Backend profile API for provider/manual/Hysteria2 profiles
Safe select with real proxy check and rollback
Multi-router compare shows protocol/user and duplicate Hysteria2 users
Dependency Doctor API and UI block for Entware/Xray/lighttpd/cron/routing checks
Generated bootstrap script for clean Keenetic/Netcraze Entware installs
Standalone dist/keenvless-bootstrap.sh for one-command LAN deployments
Read-only Rescue WireGuard planner: NAT/LAN status plus VPS, Keenetic and operator config artifacts
Overlay refresh is single-flight and rate-limited to avoid KeenDNS/CGI 503/504 bursts
Simple mode is now the default UI, with expert mode available via expert=1
